purpose: Tracked 1.0 readiness status snapshot. It records observed gaps and required proof artifacts; it is not completion evidence.

approvalTarget.resolutionRule: Each reviewer approves the resolved pre-close head and full ec68c61..<pre-close-HEAD> range. The subsequent commit is strictly evidence-only and names the reviewed range and closeout commit; any later substantive commit invalidates approval.

task2.approvalResult: Two independent reviewers approved the complete frozen range with no findings.
task2.liveDecision: expense-list ignores start/end and honors page/page-size

task3.approvalResult: Two independent reviewers approved both the upstream and downstream frozen ranges with no blocking findings.
task3.openApiTruthChange: ExpenseUpdateRequest.file is optional; ExpenseCreateRequest.required remains amount, categoryId, date, userId.

task4.approvalResult: Two independent reviewers approved the complete frozen range with no findings.
task4.generatedTruth: timeEntries.listForUser accepts ClockifyApi.ListForUserTimeEntriesRequest and returns ClockifyApi.TimeEntry[]; both MCP review/fix paths use those types directly.
task4.scanContract: Review retains its all-page maxPages guard; fix retains cross-page ambiguity detection and stops before inspecting entry 10,001.
task4.customFieldProjection: Replace-style fixes rebuild each read customFieldValues item as a validated writable customFields object, strip read-only fields, and fail before update on malformed or duplicate values.

operationReachability.approvalResult: Two independent reviewers approved the complete frozen range with no blocking findings.
operationReachability.failClosedProof: make operation-coverage regenerates ignored inputs, runs both operation evidence fixture suites, and reuses the canonical validator to reject stale counts, unsuccessful or duplicate/missing receipts, new/renamed/unclassified derived operations, duplicate/missing dispositions, method/path drift, explicit/derived inversion, unreviewed ledger anchors, omitted/duplicate/orphan evidence-audit rows, false empty markers, semantic anchor-set drift, and disposition/evidence mismatch.

task6.approvalResult: Two independent reviewers approved the complete frozen range with no blocking findings.
task6.compileProof: make breaking-change-review owns codegen -> sync -> build -> mapping/wiring tests -> Bundler and built public-package compile-negative fixtures -> prose contract checks; root and ensure-subpath removals plus project/client adapter migrations are compiled.

task8.equalityProof: wrapper/tests/authenticated-host-equality.test.ts pins the hand-written CLOCKIFY_PROD_HOSTS/LOOPBACK_HOSTS equal to the generated and emitter-template sets, proves every emitted per-operation baseUrl host is an allowlist member accepted at the constructor and fetch boundaries, rejects near-miss hosts at both boundaries, and pins the config-precedence policy host list; the scan fails closed on missing literals or an empty per-operation set.
task8.contractAnchor: docs/config-precedence-contract.json surface authenticated-host-equality plus policy markers; make config-precedence reports 4 surfaces checked.

task9to12.engine: scripts/pack-consumer-smoke.mjs prints exact-artifact sha512 digests, offers fail-closed --package=wrapper|cli|mcp release-proof modes, and adds a packed-server MCP stdio initialize/tools-list smoke; each package's prepublishOnly ends with its single-package mode, pinned exactly in docs/package-contract.json and docs/developer-environment-contract.json.

crossPackageReleaseProof.currentPackSmokeBehavior: scripts/pack-consumer-smoke.mjs prints each tarball's name and sha512 integrity digest, proves install/import/bin/stdio behavior in temporary consumer projects, and removes tarballs and consumer roots unless KEEP_CLOCKIFY_PACK_SMOKE_TEMP=1.
crossPackageReleaseProof.closureArtifact: docs/roadmap-1.0-receipts/task-13-exact-artifact.md names the three tarball digests, consumer commands, and successful outputs from the make-exit-0 closure run at e105470.
crossPackageReleaseProof.riskClosure: cross-package-release-proof-asymmetry accepted 2026-07-22 per its closure gate.
